title: Velvety Indulgent Venezuelan Ham Stir-fry
description: A savory and indulgent dish featuring ham with a creamy texture without eggs, perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.
instructions: Slice the ham into thin strips and set aside.
Peel and finely chop the onions. Mince the garlic cloves.
In a small bowl, mix together the chopped onions, minced garlic, thyme sprigs, and red pepper flakes with 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil until well combined.
Heat another tablespoon of vegetable oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add the onion-garlic mixture and cook until fragrant and translucent, about 3 minutes.
Fold in the ham strips and continue to stir for an additional 2-3 minutes until heated through.
Season with salt to taste. Serve hot as a main dish or side.
